info.title: Elering dashboard API documentation
info.description: This document describes different data sets that Elering Dashboard is providing.

get.summary: RSS feed
ARIS RSS feed
This method gets all gas urgent market messages for selected event
get.description: Gas system urgent market message history

get.summary: This method gets all gas urgent market messages for selected filters
get.description: Gas system urgent market messages

parameters.name: affected_asset_name
parameters.description: message affected assets names to fetch

parameters.name: event_duration_date_time_start
parameters.description: message event duration date time start to include in response

parameters.name: event_duration_date_time_end
parameters.description: message event duration date time end to include in response

parameters.description: message publication datetime start to include in response

get.summary: This method gets selected gas urgent market message data
get.description: Gas system urgent market message details

get.summary: Cross-border electricity transmission data (5-minute intervals)
get.description: This method gets cross-border electricity transmission 5-minute interval data for selected time period (maximum allowed time period per request is one year), accepted date formats are 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm', 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'hh:mm:ssZ'

get.summary: Latest cross-border electricity transmission data
get.description: This method gets latest available cross-border electricty transmission data

get.summary: Cross-border electricity transmission data (hourly)
get.description: This method gets cross-border electricity transmission hourly data for selected time period (maximum allowed time period per request is one year), accepted date formats are 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm', 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'hh:mm:ssZ'

get.summary: Cross-border electricity transmission data (hourly) in CSV file
get.description: This method gets cross-border electricity transmission hourly data for selected time period in CSV file (maximum allowed time period per request is one year), accepted date formats are 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm', 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'hh:mm:ssZ'

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: fields to include in the output
